## Summary
- briefly describe the change
- list the main files or modules affected

## Why this change
Explain the problem being solved or the improvement being made.

## Type of change
- [ ] bug fix
- [ ] new feature
- [ ] refactor
- [ ] documentation update
- [ ] build / CI improvement
- [ ] performance improvement

## Testing
- [ ] manual test completed
- [ ] startup path checked
- [ ] related workflow checked
- [ ] screenshots attached if UI changed

Describe what you tested and how.

## Checklist
- [ ] follows project architecture principles
- [ ] no unnecessary business logic added to UI layer
- [ ] documentation updated when needed
- [ ] no backup / temp files included
- [ ] no personal paths or sensitive data included

## Notes for reviewers
Add any context, tradeoffs, or follow-up items here.
